CommandPod.activationGroupNames: Auto Launch: Target,Auto Deorbit: Target,Auto Droo Return,Elevator,Seat Config,Open Hatch,External Light,Internal Light,Landing Gear,RCS

Constant.text: Automated Vizzy located on "Vizzy Here" Part
Ladder, only active when door & landing leg are open
Solar Panel Auto Close or Open
Universal MFD Vizzy Mission 1.05 by Rizkman (c)2020
Auto Orbit, Rendezvous, Docking, Orbit Transfer, Landing
Don't complain about my Vizzy. I'm not a programmer or enginer
Vizzy Stumpff Function, for z > 0 because vizzy can't calculate imaginary number
Kepler Universal Variable, for eliptic orbit only
Return Universal Anomaly X since Delta Time
Predictor for guessing intercept point, based on Lagrange formula

CallCustomInstruction.call: F and G function from Universal

CustomInstruction.callFormat: F and G function from Universal (0) Initial (1) since (2)
CustomInstruction.format: F and G function from Universal |anomaly| Initial |position| since |deltatime|
CustomInstruction.name: F and G function from Universal

Constant.text: input: Universal Anomaly since delta t, r0. Required Mu and Reciprocal SMA

CustomInstruction.callFormat: F. and G. from Universal (0) initial (1) last (2) since (3)
CustomInstruction.format: F. and G. from Universal |anomaly| initial |position1| last |position2| since |deltatime|
CustomInstruction.name: F. and G. from Universal

Constant.text: input: Universal Anomaly since delta t, r0, r since delta t. Required Mu and Reciprocal SMA

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Lambert's Solver from (0) to (1) in (2) sec
CustomInstruction.format: Lambert's Solver from |position1| to |position2| in |deltatime| sec
CustomInstruction.name: Lambert's Solver from

Constant.text: Solution for Lambert's Problem in my version, input: vectorR1, vectorR2, & elapsed time

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Trajectory Calculation from (0) to (1) within (2) in (3) sec
CustomInstruction.format: Trajectory Calculation from |position1| to |position2| within |CenterOfMass| in |DeltaTime| sec
CustomInstruction.name: Trajectory Calculation from

Constant.text: Phase Angle with same Orbit Plane
Target Angle Alignment: {0:n0} deg | Current Angle: {1:n0} deg | Departure Time: {2} day(s)
Target Angle Alignment: {0:n0} deg | Current Angle: {1:n0} deg | Departure Time: {2}:{3:00}:{4:00}

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Launch to Orbit (0) km, (1) deg, LAN (2) deg
CustomInstruction.format: Launch to Orbit |apoapsis| km, |inclination| deg, LAN |longitude| deg
CustomInstruction.name: Launch to Orbit

Constant.text: Aligning to Target Orbital Plane : {0:n2} deg
Escape Angle: {0:n0} deg | Current: {1:n0} deg | Time Remaining: {2}:{3:00}:{4:00} | T: {5:n0} sec
Transfer Burn | DeltaV Remaining: {0:n1} m/s | Burn Time: {1:n1} sec
Exhaust Velocity between game data & vizzy not in same result
Waiting Apoapsis Burn: {0}:{1:00}:{2:00} | DeltaV: {3:n0} m/s | Burn time: {4:n0} sec
Circularization | DeltaV Remaining: {0:n1} m/s | Burn Time: {1:n1} sec
Target Landing Offset at (east,north,0) in meter
Default Home Planet Parking Orbit Altitude
Default Target Planet Parking Orbit Altitude
Matching Inclination | Time to Ascending Node= {0}:{1:00}:{2:00}
Matching Inclination | Time to Descending Node= {0}:{1:00}:{2:00}
Matching Inclination | Remaining: {0:n3} Degree | Delta V: {1:n2} m/s | Burn time: {2:n2} sec

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Landing Trajectory (0) to (1) with (2) in (3) sec
CustomInstruction.format: Landing Trajectory |position1| to |position2| with |CenterMass| in |time| sec
CustomInstruction.name: Landing Trajectory

Constant.text: Rendezvous Rate X:{0:n1} | Y:{1:n1} | Z {2:n1} m/s

Please Select Docking Port!
Selected: {0} (is not docking port)
Target Dist: {0:n1} m | Rel Vel: {1:n1} m/s
Escape Burn | Delta V Remaining: {0:n1} m/s
I will add abort system for the next update
Wait until Delta V is <color=#05DD05>ZERO</color> || {0} || DeltaV Remaining: {1:n2} m/s |

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Time Wrap in (0) Limit (1) sec, (2) m, Orientation (3)
CustomInstruction.format: Time Wrap in |DeltaT| Limit |time| sec, |distance| m, Orientation |vector|
CustomInstruction.name: Time Wrap in

Constant.text: Auto Roll Control, Roll Bug on 0.9.404

CustomInstruction.callFormat: Landing PID, P (0) I (1) D (2) Offset (3) (4) meter
CustomInstruction.format: Landing PID, P |KP| I |KI| D |KD| Offset |x| |y| meter
CustomInstruction.name: Landing PID, P

Constant.text: No Target Selected | Retro Burn, Delta V = {0} m/s
Waiting Suicide Burn | time to impact = {0}:{1:00}:{2:00}

Select your target
Then Press AG.1 to Start!
Waiting Suicide Burn | Current Lateral Dist: {0:n2} km | time to impact = {1}:{2:00}:{3:00}
Aero Diving | Lateral Dist: {0:n2} km | time to impact = {1}:{2:00}:{3:00}
Lat Dist: {0:n2} km | Lat Vel: {1:n1} m/s | Impact Time: {2}:{3:00}:{4:00} sec | Pitch: {5:n2}

Select your target
Then Press AG.2 to Land!

Return to Home?
Then press AG.3 to start!
Rendezvous time: {0:n0} sec | Delta V: {1:n0} m/s
Relative Vel: {0:n0} m/s | Lateral Vel: {1:n0} m/s | Distance: {2:n1} km
Welcome to {0} SOI, Auto Pilot Off

CustomExpression.format: Target DeltaV, to |TargetEnergy| from |PotentialEnergy| with |position| |velocity| return (0)
CustomExpression.name: Target DeltaV, to

CustomExpression.callFormat: Time until Surface, with Alt (0) m
CustomExpression.format: Time until Surface, with Alt |AGL| m return (0)
CustomExpression.name: Time until Surface, with Alt
